headline: Crimson Tide Pods: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Crimson Tide Pods is projected #14 of 16 with a 522.70 projected-starting-lineup C-AVI total, led by DeVonta Smith, Alec Pierce, and Justin Herbert. The immediate priority is improving the FLEX slot without weakening that core.

projected_power.method: Sum of the eight verified projected starters' C-AVI values from all 16 AVI-Core team files

dynasty_power.method: Sum of every verified rostered player's D-AVI value from all 16 AVI-Core team files

latest_trade.summary: On June 30, Crimson Tide Pods traded with Conquistadors, Northside Kings and acquired Alec Pierce, 2027 Round 1 (SmokyValleyWheatWarriors), 2027 Round 2 (Northside Kings) while sending Harold Fannin, Mike Evans. Alec Pierce is now the current WR starter at 74.8 C-AVI and 78.5 D-AVI; The deal added 2 draft assets.

gap_closing_moves: Raise the FLEX slot above Jerry Jeudy's 49.2 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 71.4 C-AVI would directly attack the 22.20-point projected gap to Rapid Valley Annihilation.
Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

latest_trade.summary: On July 15, Northside Kings traded with Ravens Regime and acquired RJ Harvey, Bhayshul Tuten, 2026 Round 2 (Rapid Valley Annihilation) while sending Tyler Warren. RJ Harvey is now the current RB starter at 62.5 C-AVI and 75.3 D-AVI; Bhayshul Tuten is now the current RB starter at 73.0 C-AVI and 78.7 D-AVI; The deal added 1 draft asset.

rival_below.summary: On July 15, Northside Kings traded with Ravens Regime and acquired RJ Harvey, Bhayshul Tuten, 2026 Round 2 (Rapid Valley Annihilation) while sending Tyler Warren. RJ Harvey is now the current RB starter at 62.5 C-AVI and 75.3 D-AVI; Bhayshul Tuten is now the current RB starter at 73.0 C-AVI and 78.7 D-AVI; The deal added 1 draft asset.

sections.title: Projected Power Position
sections.body: Projected #14 of 16 at 522.70 lineup C-AVI. Rapid Valley Annihilation is immediately above at 544.90, a gap of 22.20. Northside Kings is immediately behind at 491.10.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are DeVonta Smith (87.5), Alec Pierce (74.8), and Justin Herbert (71.8).

sections.title: Latest Trade Impact
sections.body: On June 30, Crimson Tide Pods traded with Conquistadors, Northside Kings and acquired Alec Pierce, 2027 Round 1 (SmokyValleyWheatWarriors), 2027 Round 2 (Northside Kings) while sending Harold Fannin, Mike Evans. Alec Pierce is now the current WR starter at 74.8 C-AVI and 78.5 D-AVI; The deal added 2 draft assets.

sections.title: Moves to Close the Gap
sections.body: Raise the FLEX slot above Jerry Jeudy's 49.2 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 71.4 C-AVI would directly attack the 22.20-point projected gap to Rapid Valley Annihilation. Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Jerry Jeudy is the lowest C-AVI starter in the verified championship lineup at 49.2. Any acquisition should clear that exact lineup threshold.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 11 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active.
